title: Tenant Bootstrap
description: Operator-initiated bootstrap request, plan review, and queuing surface. Outcome-oriented naming — interaction model (wizard, multi-step, review-and-submit) is a rendering choice, not a surface identity. Directly bound to 3 OpenAPI operations (resolveEffectiveConfigurationPlan, createTenantBootstrapRequest, getTenantBootstrapRequest) and 2 AsyncAPI events (tenant.bootstrap.requested, effective-plan.resolved). Plan resolution is market-dependent: resolved packs, deferred items, and gating blockers vary by legal market. Country-regulatory pack variation affects content (which packs appear in the plan), not surface visibility. Same-workspace drill target from control-plane.tenants.detail.

dataSources.description: Resolve an effective-tenant-configuration plan from market profile and operator selections. Returns resolvedPacks, deferredItems, readinessPosture.
Submit a bootstrap request referencing a resolved effective plan. Returns 202 Accepted — queued, not immediately provisioned.
Check status of a previously submitted bootstrap request.
AsyncAPI event emitted when operator submits a bootstrap request.
AsyncAPI event emitted when composition resolver produces an effective-tenant-configuration plan.
